headline: FBI investigates Cybertruck explosion outside Trump Las Vegas hotel
summary: A Tesla (TSLA) Cybertruck exploded outside of President-elect Donald Trumps Las Vegas hotel on New Years Day. Coinciding with the New Orleans truck attack that killed 15 people, the FBI and other law enforcement agencies are investigating whether there are any connections to these two incidents. The Morning Briefs Brad Smith and Madison Mills report the latest news, noting that law enforcement officials currently believe the Cybertruck explosion was an isolated incident. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Morning Brief here. This post was written by Luke Carberry Mogan.
